name: Castle War
short_description: 《Warcraft 3: The Frozen Throne》 and 《Mirage War》 are two games that I really love in my childhood, and it would be a lot of fun to mix them together with some design.....
detailed_description:
The player takes on the role of a general on the continent of Demia, who discovers something unbelievable in the southeastern part of the kingdom due to a sudden attack by goblins and minotaurs, and plans to lead his army to find out......

This is an auto-chess tower defense, the player builds a house on the left side of the map, the house will keep spawning soldiers, and the enemies on the right will keep appearing, try to attack your castle, train lumberjacks and miners to collect resources, reasonably allocate resources for building houses or recruit mercenaries, when your houses and mercenaries are enough, you can form a reverse thrust until you destroy the enemy's castle!

The game has a total of 5 levels, 7 kinds of houses corresponding to different classes, as well as a variety of mercenaries and magic that can change the form of the battlefield, the game flow is not long, and the content is not much, but I believe he will give you about 1 hour of happy time!
